baseline.topology: web frontend -> Go backend -> Strategy Execution Service / Runtime Broker -> isolated runtime implementation(s)

candidateComparison.containment: Host subprocess baseline; process boundary without container filesystem/network controls.
Docker/runc container subprocess; requests no network, read-only root, tmpfs scratch, dropped capabilities, no-new-privileges, PID, memory, and CPU controls.

candidatePreflight.runscEvidence: not evaluated in default readiness; strict runsc command fails loudly when unavailable

candidates.doesNotProve: Production sandbox certification, counted Python eligibility, or broad multi-language support.
candidates.label: Worker-thread baseline
candidates.proves: Probe behavior matched the current runtime ABI expectations for this local lane.

containerControlEvidence.controlEvidenceKind: adapter argv and metadata request; not kernel-level production sandbox certification

noFallbackDrills.expectedFailureMode: Go orchestration reports runtime-service failure without executing Strategy code in web/API/Go.
noFallbackDrills.label: Runtime service stopped

noFallbackDrills.expectedFailureMode: Python exhibition beta fails closed without substituting JS/TS or in-process execution.
noFallbackDrills.label: Python runtime stopped

noFallbackDrills.expectedFailureMode: Strict candidate commands exit non-zero and name the unavailable candidate.
noFallbackDrills.label: gVisor/runsc unavailable

noFallbackDrills.expectedFailureMode: Strict container evidence exits non-zero or records non-promotion without subprocess substitution.
noFallbackDrills.label: Docker or image unavailable

noFallbackDrills.expectedFailureMode: Check commands reject stale JSON or Markdown readiness evidence.
noFallbackDrills.label: Stale artifacts

noFallbackDrills.expectedFailureMode: Monitors reject evidence that claims a required lane while the required candidate was skipped.
noFallbackDrills.label: Silent substitution

readinessLanes.label: Default readiness lane
readinessLanes.unavailableBehavior: Hardened subprocess evidence is required; Docker and runsc candidates may record unavailable state.

readinessLanes.label: Container required lane
readinessLanes.unavailableBehavior: Fails loudly when container evidence is requested but Docker/container execution is unavailable or skipped.

readinessLanes.label: gVisor/runsc required lane
readinessLanes.unavailableBehavior: Fails loudly when runsc evidence is requested but runsc is unavailable or no runsc probe adapter exists; no subprocess or Docker substitution is accepted.
